nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: One day, a unicorn you have recently met - that is, me - was driving to a nearby town in his car.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: The wind was blowing my mane, and the evening sunset was quickly sinking below the horizon.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: The car consumed kilometers after kilometers.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: I was enjoying a country trip.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: By the way, it wasn't an ordinary car.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: It was a black convertible with an eight-cylinder engine.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: …It had 142 horsepower and a three-speed gearbox.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: …It was the first concept car for the entire automotive industry.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: …An experimental model designed to demonstrate new technologies, not for mass sale!

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: …He was just filled to the brim with these technologies…

nodes.speaker: pay
nodes.text: We get the car part. Go on.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: …As you might have guessed from my description, the car was unique.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: That's why I couldn't calculate the fuel for my trip correctly.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: …And stalled in the middle of the forest.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: All my futile attempts to start the car were unsuccessful.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: But I didn't panic, because there was a gas station not far behind.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: I decided to leave my car and walk on my own.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Trying to ignore the many rustling sounds coming from the forest, which were no longer drowned out by the engine's roar…

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: I walked further.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Up close, the gas station didn't look as appealing as it had before.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: There was no light coming from the windows, and no sound was coming from inside.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: I went inside…

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: The gas station looked dark, abandoned, and creepy.…

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: …But for your information, there were absolutely no ghosts there!

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: After a quick look around, I realized that I would have to deal with my problems on my own.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: There was no one at the cash register, so I left the fuel payment and calculated my change myself.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: I found a canister in the storeroom, so I decided to borrow it.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: For some reason, the gas pump wasn't working.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: I probably forgot something important in the gas station.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: I placed the canister under the pump and began to fill it with fuel..

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: As I was filling it, the rustling in the woods got louder and louder.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Finally, the canister was full, and I hurried back to my car.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Suddenly, wolves jumped out of the forest right behind me!

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Without thinking twice, I ran towards the car as fast as I could.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Did... did they catch you?

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Of course not!

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: When I reached the car, the wolves were far behind me.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: I immediately poured all the fuel from the canister into the tank and got into the car.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: As if realizing the danger along with me, the car immediately started and drove off.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Even though I felt safe inside the moving car,

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: for some reason I kept hearing the wolves howling.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: It sent shivers down my spine.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Suddenly, I noticed a light in the rearview mirror.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: It was still the same wolves!

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: They only stayed behind just to get into their own cars!

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Finally, the headlights behind me stopped blinding me from the rearview mirror.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: The wolves made a mistake when they chose outdated cars from a bygone era!

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: And I left this forest without any problems and did not return there again.
